message:
feat(nav): add Sessions link to main navigation

Add navigation entry for the Brenner Loop Sessions feature, enabling
users to access the hypothesis testing session management interface.

## Changes

- Add SessionsIcon: Flask/beaker SVG icon representing scientific
  experimentation, consistent with the Brenner Loop methodology theme
- Add Sessions nav item at position after Method, linking to /sessions

## Icon Design

The sessions icon uses a laboratory flask motif (path from Heroicons)
to visually communicate:
- Scientific rigor of the Brenner Loop process
- Experimental nature of hypothesis testing sessions
- Connection to the broader "Method" concept

Positioned after "Method" in the nav order since sessions are where
users apply the method in practice.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
